entries.title: Cold and Cough
entries.text_content: For winter cold and cough, traditional Kashmiri Kahwa with crushed ginger, cinnamon, and a pinch of saffron is highly effective. Drink it warm. For dry cough, consuming honey mixed with ginger juice provides relief.

entries.title: Joint Pain
entries.text_content: For joint pain during harsh winters (Chilla Kalan), warming pure mustard oil (Koshur til) with a few cloves of garlic and massaging it on the joints provides significant relief. Keep the area covered with a warm cloth after massage.

entries.title: Stomach Ache
entries.text_content: For mild stomach ache or indigestion, chewing fennel seeds (Badiyan) or drinking water boiled with mint (Pudina) and fennel can soothe the stomach. A warm compress on the abdomen also helps.

entries.title: Sore Throat
entries.text_content: For a sore throat, gargling with warm water containing a pinch of turmeric and salt is a trusted remedy. Drinking warm milk with turmeric (Haldi Doodh) before bed also accelerates healing.
